div.h3: Single-field dispatch for O(1) CQE routing

ul.li: O(1) Complexity: Dispatch avoids hash-map lookups by encoding context directly in the 64-bit identifier.
ID Capacity: 48-bit conn_id allows for 281,474,976,710,656 concurrent descriptors.
Zero Branching: Type extraction is performed via single CPU cycle bit-shift.

g.text: static inline uint64_t encode_user_data(uint8_t type, uint64_t id) {
